title: cyrtomium macrophyllum f. muticum
intro: Cyrtomium macrophyllum f. muticum, also known as the Muticus or Broad-leaved Cinnamon Fern, is a variety of the Cyrtomium macrophyllum plant, a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyrtomium macrophyllum f. muticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and derive its health benefits.
